name: CAMBER ENERGY, INC.
summary: Camber Energy, Inc. is a growth-oriented diversified company with interests in innovative technologies and custom energy solutions. Its portfolio includes a majority interest in a patented medical and bio-hazard waste treatment system using ozone technology, patented electric transmission and distribution broken conductor protection systems, a licensed clean energy and carbon-capture system, and a 49% interest in Simson-Maxwell Ltd., which provides custom energy and power solutions to commercial and industrial clients in North America.
